title: Armor Damage Indicator
description: Shows the armor durability on hud like tatical fps games.
body:
## Armor Damage Indicator A simple, flat armor damage indicator like tactical games ## Color schemes

## Features - Displays current armor durability on the HUD - Multiple color schemes (Green-Yellow-Red, Green-Red, White-Red, Transparent-Red) - Minimal and flat style, inspired by tactical games like PZ and Escape from Tarkov - Configurable positioning, size and opacity - **Required Dependencies:** [fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and optionaly [mod-menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-menu) to access the settings ## Screenshots ![Screnn1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CaioFTNT/Armor-Damage-Indicator/main/assets/Screenshot1.png) ![Screnn2](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CaioFTNT/Armor-Damage-Indicator/main/assets/Screenshot2.png) ![Screnn3](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CaioFTNT/Armor-Damage-Indicator/main/assets/Screenshot3.png) ## Other - If you find a bug or would like to suggest somehting, do so on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/T5mMeaBDbY). - A special thanks to [CaioFTNT](https://modrinth.com/user/G5kiS5Dp) and my team at [My Time Studios](https://modrinth.com/organization/MT-Studio).
